title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: YouTube video by AI Search explaining Deepseek V4's engineering, including hybrid attention mechanisms, sparse selection, and infrastructure challenges. Covers handling 1M context through techniques like Contracted Sparse Attention, Heavy-Compute Attention, sliding window attention, and anticipatory routing.
